name: Tufted Canvas Round Storage Bin - Cloud Island™ Medium Gray/Cream
description:
Help keep your kid's items organized with this Medium Gray/Cream Tufted Canvas Round Storage Bin from Cloud Island™. This round storage bin brings sweet style to your child's playroom or baby's nursery. It features a gray canvas construction that's decorated with cream, tufted stripes for a fun, fluffy texture. This practical medium-sized bin is designed with two attached handles for easy portability, and it can be placed anywhere around the room to keep their toys, books, stuffed animals, bath items and other essentials organized.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
